title: 60 Extra Strong Scented Bin Liners 15L | Fragranced Pedal Bin Bags Lemon + Vanilla Scents, 2 rolls of 30
features: 60 Extra Strong Scented Pedal Bin Liners – Great Value Pack. This convenient pack includes 2 rolls of 30 bags (60 total) in refreshing Lemon and Vanilla fragrances perfect for keeping your bins smelling fresh while handling daily waste.

Holds Up to 15 Litres – Ideal for Small Pedal Bins. Designed to fit standard pedal bins up to 15L, these liners are the perfect size for kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and offices offering a neat and secure fit every time.
Each bag features strong tie handles that make lifting, sealing, and disposing of waste quick, clean, and hassle-free. No spills, no mess just tie and toss.

Extra Strong & Tear-Resistant Material. Crafted for durability, these bin liners are reinforced to resist rips and leaks, even when filled with heavier waste. Ideal for daily use in busy households or workplaces.

Freshly Fragranced to Neutralize Odours. Infused with light, pleasant scents, these bags help mask unpleasant bin smells. Enjoy long-lasting freshness from your choice of vanilla or lavender with every use.
description: Keep your home smelling fresh and your bins clean with this value pack of 60 Extra Strong Scented Pedal Bin Liners. Each pack includes 2 rolls of 30 bags in three delightful fragrances Vanilla, and Lemon Citrus offering a long-lasting supply of freshness for your kitchen, bathroom, or office. Designed to hold up to 15 litres, these bin liners are ideal for most standard pedal bins. The built-in tie handles make them incredibly easy to use simply lift, tie, and dispose for a clean, mess-free bin change every time. Crafted from extra strong, tear-resistant plastic, these liners can handle everyday waste with ease. The added fragrance not only keeps your bin smelling pleasant but also helps to neutralize unpleasant odors, making them a perfect choice for households, care homes, small offices, and more. Whether you’re dealing with food waste, bathroom rubbish, or daily household debris, these scented bin liners offer a hygienic, practical, and pleasantly aromatic solution.
